featured.name: GLM-5.1
featured.tagline: 754B parameter open-weight agentic model for autonomous coding tasks.
featured.why_radar: Finally, an open model built specifically for agents, not benchmarks. GLM-5.1 handles 8-hour autonomous execution and tops SWE-Bench Pro, which matters more than yet another chat model. This is what we've been waiting for in truly agentic AI.

featured.name: Output.ai
featured.tagline: Open-source framework extracted from 500+ production AI agents.
featured.why_radar: Built from real production experience, not theory. When a framework emerges from 500 deployed agents, it's worth paying attention to. This could become the Rails of agent development.

picks.name: Google AI Dictation
picks.tagline: Offline-first AI dictation app using Gemma models.
picks.why_radar: Google quietly shipping an offline-first dictation app shows the shift towards edge AI is real. Using Gemma models locally means no cloud dependency, which is exactly where mobile AI should be heading.

picks.name: Marimo Pair
picks.tagline: Reactive Python notebooks as environments for AI agents.
picks.why_radar: Turning notebooks into agent environments is brilliant. Marimo's reactive approach means agents can work in living documents that update as they compute. This bridges the gap between exploration and automation.

picks.name: Dinobase
picks.why_radar: Agents need different data patterns than humans. A database built specifically for agent workflows could solve the persistent memory problem that's holding back long-running autonomous systems.

picks.name: Frontend-VisualQA
picks.tagline: Give coding agents eyes to verify their own UI work.
picks.why_radar: Coding agents that can actually see what they've built changes everything. No more blind UI generation. This visual feedback loop is essential for autonomous frontend development.

hn_top5.title: Show HN: Output.ai - OSS framework we extracted from 500+ production AI agents
hn_top5.summary: Open-source framework built from real production experience with 500+ AI agents. Provides battle-tested patterns for building reliable agent systems.

hn_top5.title: Show HN: Marimo pair – Reactive Python notebooks as environments for agents
hn_top5.summary: Turns reactive notebooks into environments where AI agents can work with living documents. Bridges the gap between data exploration and automation.

hn_top5.title: GLM-5.1 matches Opus 4.6 in agentic performance, at ~1/3 actual cost
hn_top5.summary: New 754B parameter model specifically built for agent tasks achieves competitive performance at significantly lower cost. Built for autonomous execution rather than chat.

hn_top5.title: Show HN: I built a database for AI agents
hn_top5.summary: Purpose-built database designed for AI agent workflows and persistent memory needs. Addresses data patterns that differ from traditional human-facing applications.

hn_top5.title: Show HN: Frontend-VisualQA — give coding agents eyes to verify their own UI work
hn_top5.summary: Tool that lets coding agents visually verify the UI they generate. Provides visual feedback loop for autonomous frontend development.
